description: Build, validate, and persist Webcake landing-page source JSON: element schemas plus AI usage hints.
name: io.github.vuluu2k/webcake-landing-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Webcake backend JWT; required only for the persistence tools (create/update/list pages).
environmentVariables.name: WEBCAKE_JWT

environmentVariables.description: Webcake environment preset that fills the API/app/builder base URLs.
environmentVariables.name: WEBCAKE_ENV

environmentVariables.description: Override for the Webcake API base URL (takes precedence over WEBCAKE_ENV).
environmentVariables.name: WEBCAKE_API_BASE

environmentVariables.description: Default Webcake organization id for the persistence tools.
environmentVariables.name: WEBCAKE_ORG_ID

environmentVariables.description: Optional Pexels API key for search_images; without one a shared hosted proxy is used.
environmentVariables.name: PEXELS_API_KEY

title: Webcake Landing
